bookSourceComment: 笔趣阁小说站，搜索返回JSON格式，正文通过备用域名API获取绕过验证。

ruleBookInfo.name: h1@text
ruleBookInfo.author: .small span.0@text##作者：##
ruleBookInfo.init: @js:var idx = baseUrl.indexOf('book/'); if(idx > -1){var idx2 = baseUrl.indexOf('/', idx+5); var bookId = baseUrl.substring(idx+5, idx2); var bookInfo = java.ajax('https://5b78c.bqg353.xyz/api/book?id=' + bookId); var data = JSON.parse(bookInfo); source.put('dirid', data.dirid || bookId); source.put('bookId', bookId);} result;
